question_text: Let 𝐴∈𝑀𝑛(ℝ) be an 𝑛× 𝑛 real matrix, 𝑛≥2. Consider the following two statements: (I) If 𝜆∈ℂ is an eigenvalue of 𝐴, then its complex conjugate 𝜆̅ is also an eigenvalue. (II) If 𝑣= (𝑣1, 𝑣2, … , 𝑣𝑛) ∈ℂ𝑛 is an eigenvector corresponding to eigenvalue 𝜆= 𝑥+ 𝑖𝑦, 𝑦≠0, then Re(𝑣) = (Re(𝑣1), … , Re(𝑣𝑛)) and Im(𝑣) = (Im(𝑣1), … , Im(𝑣𝑛))

options.A: re linearly independent vectors over ℝ. Which of the following statements is correct?
options.D: Neither statement (I) nor statement (II) is correct
